combat_haikus: Blades flash in the dark / Steel meets the gambler's cold eye / Life fades like a breath.
Bones rattle in the cup / Empty coins and empty stares / Blood pays all the debts.
Folded steel bites deep / Honor bleeds away tonight / Only one survives.
Demon shadows dance / Fate is just a rusted blade / Cutting the night wind.
A fool's fatal bet / Goblins laughing in the dark / Gold and blood align.
The phantom blade cuts / Crimson stains the paper doors / No more bets tonight.
Ghost of the temple / Swords clash in the empty void / Silence comes at last.
The ronin waits here / Eyes shine with yakuza fire / Shadows claim the weak.
Throw the painted dice / Death ignores the gambling odds / Swing the cold katana.
A swift fatal strike / Moon hidden by dark storm clouds / The ancestors weep.
A sudden sharp draw / You bet your life on a whim / Spirits fly away.
Steel settles the score / The final draw approaches / Dust returns to dust.
Whispers in the mist / The edge finds its bloody mark / Fortune looks away.
Two enter the ring / The house always wins the bet / One shadow remains.
Silent step forward / The dice tumble on the floor / Judgment falls swiftly.
Red drops on the mat / A wager placed in the dark / The goblin collects.
No honor in chips / Only the swift strike matters / Dawn will not arrive.
Breathe in the cold night / Katana hums its final song / Your luck has run out.
Spirits of the gold / They demand a heavy toll / Your life on the line.
A laugh in the dark / The wager sealed with hot blood / You played the wrong hand.
mad_haikus: You reject my bet / The dice shatter on the floor / Time to pay in blood.
A foolish mistake / The Yakuza ghost awakes / Your luck ends right here.
No more parlor games / Steel leaves the scabbard tonight / Fortune slips away.
You dare draw your blade? / The house always claims its due / Silence takes the hall.
